negative_cases.must_reject: claiming semantic policy for direct unbrokered exec
eBPF process killing as primary command authorization
generic TLS observation presented as MCP authorization
missing vendor binary treated as a successful benchmark
baseline capture starting containerd, Apple container service, or Hyperlight
untested Swift behavior copied without an explicit preserve decision
claiming a Git argv guard blocks alternate clients or hosting-provider APIs
claiming local Git probe decisions are atomic with remote ref updates
